name: Spatial Point Pattern Analysis (Ripley's)
description: Calculate spatial point pattern statistics (Ripley's K, L, or F, G functions) using Squidpy to evaluate topological distributions, dispersion or distinct clumping patterns globally across biological features or categories.

cluster_key.description: obs key containing categorical properties representing clusters or cell types

mode.description: Ripley's statistic to compute (K: basic, L: variance-stabilized, G: nearest neighbor distances).

n_simulations.description: Number of CSR (Complete Spatial Randomness) simulations to generate confidence envelopes.

file.description: Spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad format) containing categorical labels in obs and spatial coordinates in obsm

output_config.collection_description: Outputs spatial point pattern curves plotted against a completely random distribution to pinpoint topological structuring.

items.description: CSV file containing numerical values for the Ripley K/L/G calculations across radius distance thresholds for all cell types along with normal/CSR references.
Plot showing the observed spatial pattern statistics (y-axis) vs distance thresholds (x-axis) for various clusters against theoretical random limits.
Text report detailing basic parameter setup, computation bounds, and execution length.
